content.en:
"It's finally here!"

In the Qin family's team, a rough man said excitedly.

He is one of the three Domain Realm Legendary Lords in the Qin family's team, Qin Tempest, known as the Berserk Lord, his strength is terrifying, and he is a top existence among the Realm Legendary Lords.

At this time, everyone in the Qin family had already seen the Yuanhai space-time territory.

This is a new space-time territory, if the Qin family can occupy this place, it will definitely be able to rise in the future.

"After entering the Source Sea, immediately calculate the space-time coordinates, and then construct the space-time ladder to completely connect with our Qin family. Qin Hurrry said.

"That's nature!" Qin Ming, another Realm Legendary Lord, nodded.

Wow!!!!

The Legendary Realm Lords of the Qin Family shuttled to the space-time territory and arrived at the space-time territory in an instant.

They shuttled to the Source Sea, preparing to enter the Source Sea.

At this time, the town guard legion stationed in the space-time territory discovered the movements of the Qin family.

Ye Tian knew that the Qin family would definitely come here, so he asked the town guard legion to keep guarding the space-time territory and constantly patrolling, and now he really found the legendary lords of the Qin family.

Woohoo!!!

A legendary lord of the town guard legion appeared and stopped those legendary 08 strange lords of the Qin family.

"So many Legendary Lords?"

Qin Hurricane and the other legendary lords of the Qin family showed puzzled expressions.

Although these Legendary Lords are all weak, the most powerful ones are only the Origin Realm Legendary Lords.

But the key is that according to Qin Yu's intelligence, there are not many legendary lords in Yuanhai at all, and there are only a few.

Other than that.

Qin Tempest felt the aura and rules that belonged to the Infinite Sea from these legendary lords.

Obviously, these Legendary Lords are not the Legendary Lords of the Source Sea, but belong to the Infinite Sea.

"The forces from the Infinite Sea!"

Qin Tempest said secretly.

"Which force are you from?" Qin Tempest exuded the aura of a legendary lord of his top realm realm, overwhelming the entire audience, and the endless territory trembled under his coercion.

Those Legendary Lords in the Guarding Legion felt the aura of the Realm Legendary Lords on Qin Hurricane's body, and they all trembled.

This is the Legendary Lord of the Domain Realm, far beyond their existence, even if they join forces, they are far from being the opponent of the Legendary Lord of the Domain Realm.

However, they are not very panicked, because they have backers behind them.

"We belong to the Guardian Legion under the command of the Endless Lord!"

One of the town guards revealed his origins.

There is no holy place!

When the many legendary lords of the Qin family heard this, their expressions immediately changed drastically.

Compared to the True Saintless Land, the Qin family is undoubtedly an ant-like existence.

However, they didn't immediately withdraw, after all, others said that they were from the True Absence Holy Land, so did they belong to the True Absence Holy Land?

What kind of credentials are empty?"

Qin Hurricane said.

That's when it happened.

A voice came.

"You are from the Infinite Sea Qin family, right?

The void area rippled, and a young man walked out of the void, and it was Ye Tian.

"It's you!"

The Qin Family Legendary Realm Lord recognized Ye Tian, after all, the picture provided by Qin Yu had Ye Tian.

The legendary lord of the origin sea of the origin realm - the Endless Lord.

Ye Tian opened his mouth and said, "I am a member of the Heaven Rank Saint Son level of the True Saintless Land, and I am the leader of the town guard-Endless Lord billion."

After speaking, a seal appeared behind Ye Tian.

The light of this seal illuminates hundreds of millions of territories, and at the same time, the projection of the True Immortal Land appears on the seal.

"There is really no seal of the town guard of the Holy Land!

The Qin family has recognized it, this thing can't be faked.

Obviously, Ye Tian joined the True Void Holy Land, and also became the Heavenly Rank Saint Son of the True Void Saint Land, and obtained the position of Town Guard Commander.

"Damn, this Endless Commander is so fast, and before we even arrived, he joined the True Void Holy Land!"

Qin Qifeng scolded secretly.

If Ye Tian hadn't joined the True No Holy Land, he could have killed Ye Tian at any time.

But now, Ye Tiannai is the town guard commander of the True Saintless Land, and he is one of the high-level leaders.

They can't kill Ye Tian silently, maybe Ye Tian's clone is still in the True Saintless Land.

Once the Qin family dared to make a move against the town guards of the True No Holy Land, it would be tantamount to declaring war on the True No Holy Land.

The Qin family faced the True Saintless Land, like ants, and they couldn't shake it at all.

If war is really declared, the Qin family will have to perish.

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord for becoming the Guardian Leader of the True Void Holy Land, we are only here this time to retrieve our Qin family's Eternal Supreme Treasure Fire Domain Sword. Qin Hurry Wind held back the anger in his heart and said lightly.

"Fire Domain Sword? What is that, I don't have it here. Now this is the town guard area of the True Sacred Land, and it is also my territory, please leave!" Ye Tian drove people away.

"You!"

Qin Storm was furious, and he wanted to immediately suppress Ye Tian, but the other two Realm Legendary Lords stopped him.

"Let's go first!"

Qin Ming said.

The Qin family did not have a conflict with Ye Tian and turned to leave.

Meanwhile.

The Qin family also knew about the situation in Yuanhai, and there was no way to solve it.

When the Qin Family's Qin Wuyuan Ancestor learned of the situation, he immediately issued an order, that is, to reveal the location of the Source Sea, although he could not occupy an eternal sea like the Source Sea, but he would not let the True Saint Land secretly develop the Source Sea, and it would be good to make some trouble for the True Nothing Holy Land and Ye Tian.

Soon.

A large number of forces in the Infinite Sea knew that the True Infinite Sea had found a new Eternal Sea, and it was a very young Eternal Sea.

All of a sudden, many 110 Legendary Lords wanted to enter the Source Sea to take a look.

-

There is no holy place.

The Frostless Lord came to find Ye Tian.

"I've seen the Frostless Lord!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

Wushuang nodded, and then said: "Endless Lord, the location of the Source Sea has been exposed, I am afraid that many Legendary Lords will go to the space-time territory, even if we really have no Holy Land to declare that the Source Sea is a territory that we occupy, we can't completely prevent people from entering." Therefore, I suggest that you do not block other Eternal Realms from entering the Source Sea, there are more Eternal Realms and Legendary Lords in the Source Sea, which is also conducive to the development and growth of the Source Sea. But if there is an eternal realm that provokes the legion, you don't need to be polite, just suppress it. "

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Taking advantage of this opportunity, Ye Tian asked the Frostless Lord for another lesson on the experience of impacting the Legendary Lord of the Consummation Realm.

The Frostless Lord proposed: "Endless Lord, when you step into the pinnacle of the Origin Realm Legendary Lord, if you want to impact the Legendary Lord of the Perfection Realm, you can go to the Returning Ruins Treasure Land of the True Immortal Land, which is suitable for impacting the Legendary Lord of the Perfection Realm, in addition, you also need to cultivate a secret technique - Eternal Heart, this is one of the top secret techniques of the True Infinite Holy Land, which is beneficial to the impact of the Legendary Lord of the Perfection Realm and the higher realms, it is difficult for the outside world to obtain such a top secret technique, with your current authority, it is enough to exchange 100 million"

"Thank you Lord Frostless for your advice!"

Ye Tian thanked. _
